title: Data source register entry
description: One entry per data source (or source category) considered for store-artifact collection. Implements OUTCOME_BACKLOG.md task S-011 (Data source台帳) and feeds S-012 (legal Allow/Conditional/Deny judgment). `decision` here is a DRAFT recommendation only -- per OUTCOME_BACKLOG.md S-012C, final risk acceptance is Human/counsel-only and must be recorded separately before a source may feed a production pipeline.

owner_or_url.description: Specific URL for a single named source, or a description of the category for a source class (e.g. 'individual store official websites').

terms_reference.description: What was checked: robots.txt presence/content, ToS URL, or 'none published' if unverifiable. robots.txt absence is never treated as permission.

decision.description: DRAFT recommendation from LegalOps research, not a final Human/counsel clearance (S-012C).

decision_basis.description: Reasoning, e.g. 'facts are not copyrightable; no verbatim copy of expressive content' or 'compiled listing likely carries database-right/編集著作物 protection'.

conditions.description: Required for decision=conditional, e.g. 'facts only, no verbatim text/photo copy', 'store-level data only, no cast-identifying fields'.

decision_owner.description: Role or person who recorded this draft, e.g. legalops. Human/counsel sign-off is tracked separately, not here.

next_review_at.description: An expired review date makes this entry stale; treat as deny until re-verified (fail-closed, matching templates/legal-policy.yaml).

classification.description: contains_pii sources must not be connected to the pipeline in this phase (no consent infrastructure exists yet).

stop_method.description: How to halt use of this source if it becomes unsafe (e.g. remove from allowlist config, revoke collector credential).
